name: User-Initiated Single Job Tailoring v3

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5', max_tokens: 900, temperature: 0, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.scoringPrompt }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 2600, temperature: 0.1, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.tailorPrompt }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'single_tailoring_complete', runId: $json.runId, data: { userId: $json.userId, jobId: $json.jobId, jobTitle: $json.jobTitle, company: $json.company, compatibilityScore: $json.compatibilityScore, atsKeywords: $json.atsKeywords, matchingStrengths: $json.matchingStrengths, gaps: $json.gaps, recommendation: $json.recommendation, tailoredCvMarkdown: $json.tailoredCvMarkdown, coverLetterMarkdown: $json.coverLetterMarkdown } }) }}

description: Additive v3 single-tailor workflow using HTTP Request nodes for Anthropic + persistence (no fetch in Code nodes).
